element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Horizontal traversal with basic obstacle avoidance
Melee combat and swinging from hooks
Traversal across gaps using whip mechanic
Applying gun and whip mechanics against unique opponents
Protecting AI companion through level while managing combat
Third-person perspective, obstacle avoidance under time pressure
Time-limited navigation with collision penalty system

typical_tension_triggers: NPC escort mechanic (Peter Puppy taking damage)
Racing against Psy-Crow (forced boss fight on loss)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Alternating platforming and boss battles with interrupting racing segments; tension escalates through level variety and introduces new mechanics sequentially

difficulty_curve.early_game: New Junk City introduces core mechanics (gun, whip, basic platforming) in low-stress environment
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Introduction of escort mechanics (Peter Puppy level), racing segments, and varied boss encounters increase cognitive load
difficulty_curve.late_game: Complex mechanics converge: underwater maze with time/collision limits, multiple boss types, bungee-fighting segments
notable_spikes: First boss encounter (establishes boss pattern expectation)
'For Pete's Sake' level (NPC escort introduces new failure condition)
Racing losses forcing Psy-Crow boss rematches
Underwater maze (time pressure + navigation + collision penalty stacking)

notable_level_patterns.description: Horizontal sidescrolling section with enemies and obstacles, terminating in boss battle. Player applies gun and whip mechanics learned in traversal.
Andy Asteroids segment placed between most levels. Third-person perspective, tube navigation, item collection, asteroid avoidance. Psy-Crow race; loss triggers mandatory boss fight.

Standard platforming with AI companion who must survive to level end. Whip required to make companion jump over obstacles; enemies must be defeated before harming companion or player health depletes from companion's tantrums.
Gameplay variant imposing time limit or collision penalty. Familiar mechanics but with external pressure mechanic changing risk/reward calculus.
